name: cio-shop
description: Internal IT operations for Aleut Federal — enterprise IT service management, IT governance and policy, internal CMMC / NIST 800-171 posture (POA&M, SSP), IT procurement and vendor onboarding (Section 889 / FedRAMP / BAA / TAA), and integration with the AF Policy / Procedure library. Distinct from the engineering plugin (federal customer-delivered software/systems).
